introSection: Barracuda Strike is an inverted roller coaster currently under construction at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced on October 14, 2025.

On December 1, the park shared on social media that the ride's train had arrived.

On December 12, the park shared on social media that the last track piece had been installed.

On February 17, the park announced the ride would open on March 7, 2026.

fullText:
Barracuda Strike is an inverted roller coaster currently under construction at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

The ride was announced on October 14, 2025.

On December 1, the park shared on social media that the ride's train had arrived.

On December 12, the park shared on social media that the last track piece had been installed.

On February 17, the park announced the ride would open on March 7, 2026.
